feedback_files.tests/feedback.sql:
.bail on
.read db/schema.sql
.read db/account_lookup.sql

INSERT INTO tenants(id, name) VALUES ('red', 'Red Org'), ('blue', 'Blue Org');
INSERT INTO accounts(tenant_id, external_id, display_name) VALUES
  ('red', 'shared-42', 'Red Account'),
  ('blue', 'shared-42', 'Blue Account');
INSERT INTO account_lookup_requests(request_id, tenant_id, external_id) VALUES
  ('red-request', 'red', 'shared-42'),
  ('blue-request', 'blue', 'shared-42');

CREATE TEMP TABLE assertion(ok INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(ok = 1));
INSERT INTO assertion
SELECT CASE WHEN
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resolved_accounts) = 2
  AND (SELECT display_name FROM resolved_accounts WHERE request_id = 'red-request') = 'Red Account'
  AND (SELECT display_name FROM resolved_accounts WHERE request_id = 'blue-request') = 'Blue Account'
THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;
